name: Swipe Feed
description: Primary archetype for mobile-first swipe-based social discovery apps. Hosts the core swipe deck (discover), matches grid, chat list and thread, own/other profile views, and settings — all under a single mobile-tab-bar shell with persistent bottom navigation. The first archetype in Decantr's catalog purpose-built around a card-stack swipe loop with match celebration and 1:1 chat.

pages.description: Core swipe deck — the heart of the app. Filter bar at top, card stack centered, action buttons above tab bar.
directives: Filter bar at top of body: 4 chips — All / Nearby / My Interests / New — single-select, default 'All'. Changing selection refetches the deck with mock data.

Swipe deck occupies the largest visual share of the body — at least 60% of body height. Card width 320px, aspect ratio 3/4. Use spatial-card-stack deck preset gestural defaults (30% threshold, ±15deg rotateY, spring physics).
Each card uses swipe-card pattern as its content slot — full-bleed photo with bottom gradient overlay carrying name, age, distance, bio, interests.
Swipe-action-bar sits 16px above the bottom-tab-bar with 3 buttons: Pass (X), Super Like (star, optional), Like (heart). Hotkeys: ←/↑/→.
On a successful match (mock-randomized: 30% chance on right-swipe in demo mode), trigger match-celebration overlay. First-match preset includes confetti.
When the deck is exhausted: show hero empty-state with copy 'You've seen everyone nearby! Check back later.' + a Refresh button that re-randomizes the mock deck.
Bottom-tab-bar persists with 'Swipe' tab active. Badge dots appear on Matches and Chat tabs when new matches/messages arrive.

pages.description: Grid of matched users with new-match indicators and a top presence rail.
directives: Top section: 'New Matches' label with horizontal scrolling presence-avatars rail showing matches from the last 24h. Tap an avatar to open the chat thread.
Below the rail: stats-bar with 1-2 stats — 'X new matches', 'Y total connections'. Use coral primary accent for the numerics.

Main grid: 3-column responsive grid of avatar-grid-tile (4 cols on tablet+, 5 cols on desktop within the 480px column). Each tile shows the matched user's circular avatar, name, and a violet new-match dot if unviewed. Tap navigates to /u/:userId.
If no matches yet: show hero empty-state with copy 'No matches yet. Keep swiping — your circle is forming.' and an illustration of two avatars meeting.
Bottom-tab-bar with 'Matches' active. Badge dot on Matches tab cleared when this page is viewed.

pages.description: Inbox of conversations with last-message preview and timestamp.
directives: Conversation list shows each chat as a row: circular avatar (using swipecircle-photo-frame), name, last message preview (truncated 1 line), timestamp (e.g., '2h', 'Yesterday', 'Mon'), and an unread coral dot if unread.
Tap a conversation to navigate to /chat/:userId (the chat-thread page).
If no conversations yet: show hero empty-state 'Start a conversation. Match with someone first!' with a Heart icon and a CTA back to /discover.
Bottom-tab-bar with 'Chat' active. Badge dot on Chat tab cleared when this page is viewed.

pages.description: Full 1:1 chat thread with message bubbles and an input composer.
directives: Chat header has back-button (left), partner avatar + name (center, tap → opens /u/:userId), and a More menu (right) for mute/block/report.
Messages area is the only scrolling region. My messages render right-aligned with coral fill (swipecircle-bubble decorator); their messages render left-aligned with cream fill.
Pre-populated mock conversation: 4-6 messages showing realistic banter (greeting, question, response, follow-up).
Composer at the bottom: rounded-pill text input with auto-grow (max 4 lines), Smile/Attach icons inside, Send button (coral pill) appears on right when input is non-empty.
Bottom-tab-bar remains visible by default. On input focus, hide tab-bar with a 200ms slide-down to maximize keyboard space; restore on blur.

pages.description: Logged-in user's own profile with edit access, stats, interests, and settings link.
directives: Profile hero uses own-profile preset: full-bleed cover photo (45vh), overlapping circular avatar, name+age+bio, single 'Edit Profile' coral pill CTA.
Stats-bar shows 3 stats: 'X swiped', 'Y matches', 'Z.W★ rating' — each stat formatted with lowercase units per voice guidelines.
Interests display: tech-pills rendered as the curated interest list selected during onboarding (read-only here; editable via Edit Profile).
Settings-nav: a list of links — Notifications, Privacy, Help, Logout (simulated). Tap navigates to /settings or relevant sub-routes.
Bottom-tab-bar with 'Profile' active. No badge on Profile tab.

pages.description: Read-only view of another user's profile with action buttons (Message / Like Again / Report).
directives: Profile hero uses other-profile preset: cover, avatar, name+age+bio, three action buttons (Message coral pill / Like Again white-bordered pill / Report icon-only ghost). Back button at top-left of cover.
Stats-bar shows: 'Joined {date}', 'Active {timestamp}', 'Mutual matches: N' — informational, not numeric metrics.
Interests display: shared interests highlighted (coral-filled), other interests in muted-border style.
Bottom-tab-bar inherits active state from the page user navigated from (typically Matches or Chat). Hidden on input focus is N/A here (no input).

pages.description: Simple settings list — notifications, privacy toggles, account management, simulated logout.
directives: Settings-nav at the top: vertical list of sections — Notifications, Privacy, Account, Help, About — each with a chevron-right and a brief subtitle.
Below the nav, a form with toggles for the most-used preferences: Push notifications (on/off), Show me on Discover (on/off), Read receipts (on/off).
Bottom of the page: a 'Log Out' link in danger color (var(--d-danger)). Confirmation modal on tap. In demo mode, logout clears the localStorage demo flag and routes to /.
Bottom-tab-bar with 'Profile' active (settings is a sub-route of profile).

page_briefs.discover: The heart of SwipeCircle. Mobile-tab-bar shell with the compact header showing brand mark, a 'Filters' chip-button (opens a bottom-sheet to change All/Nearby/Interests/New), and a small profile avatar at right (tap → /me). Body: a top compact filter bar (4 chips), then the swipe deck centered vertically — taking 60%+ of body height. Cards are 320×420px in the deck stack, with the front card fully interactive. Each card is a swipe-card pattern: full-bleed photo, bottom gradient overlay carrying 'Maya, 27', distance tag, bio, and 4 interest pills. Swipe right past 30% threshold flies the card off with rotateY +15deg, opacity 0, and a coral wash overlay; the next card springs forward. 16px below the deck, the swipe-action-bar with 3 buttons: X (60×60 white circle, muted), Star (48×48, violet), Heart (60×60 white circle, coral). On a match (30% mock random), the match-celebration overlay takes over: backdrop fade-in, coral-to-violet burst, two avatars sliding in from the sides meeting in the center with a heart pop, 'It's a Match!' headline, two CTAs. Auto-dismisses after 4s. Bottom-tab-bar persists. The page feels alive — animations everywhere, but never fighting the user.
page_briefs.matches: Mobile-tab-bar shell, compact header with title 'Matches'. Body opens with a 'New Matches' label and a horizontal scrolling presence-avatars rail (60×60 circular tiles with online dots and last-active timestamps). Below, a small stats-bar: '8 new matches · 24 total · 4.2★ rating' in coral primary. Below that: a 3-column grid of avatar-grid-tile cards. Each tile is a soft-shadow square with a circular 80px avatar (swipecircle-photo-frame ring), name underneath, and a violet new-match dot at top-right if unviewed. Tiles enter with a 40ms stagger on first paint. Hover lifts the tile +2px. Tap navigates to /u/:userId. If no matches yet, hero empty-state replaces the grid: an illustration of two avatars meeting, copy 'No matches yet. Keep swiping — your circle is forming.', and a coral pill 'Start swiping →' that routes to /discover. Bottom-tab-bar with Matches active.
page_briefs.chat-list: Mobile-tab-bar shell, compact header 'Chats' with a small Search icon at right. Body is a single-column conversation-list. Each row is 64px tall with: 48×48 circular avatar (swipecircle-photo-frame), 2-line stack — name (font-medium) over last-message preview (font-normal, muted, ellipsis-truncated), timestamp at right ('2h', 'Yesterday', 'Mon') and an unread coral dot if there are new messages. Rows have a 1px hairline separator in muted border color. Tap navigates to /chat/:userId. Empty state: hero with Heart icon, copy 'Start a conversation. Match with someone first!', and a coral pill CTA back to /discover. Bottom-tab-bar with Chat active.
page_briefs.chat-thread: Mobile-tab-bar shell, but the header is replaced by chat-header (compact preset): back arrow at left, partner's small 32×32 circular avatar + name centered, More icon at right. Body is the chat-thread pattern — full-height scrolling messages area with chat-message bubbles. My messages right-aligned with swipecircle-bubble decorator (coral fill, white text, right-tail). Their messages left-aligned (cream fill, dark text, left-tail). Pre-populated mock conversation of 4-6 messages showing natural-feeling banter with timestamps. At the bottom: chat-input pattern — rounded pill text input with auto-grow, Smile and Attach icons inside, and a coral Send pill button that appears when input is non-empty. Tap-to-send + Enter-to-send both work. Bottom-tab-bar persists by default but slides down on input focus to maximize keyboard space, slides back up on blur.
page_briefs.profile-own: Mobile-tab-bar shell, no header (the mobile-profile-hero takes its place visually). Body: mobile-profile-hero in own-profile preset — full-bleed cover photo (45vh), gradient overlay at bottom, More icon at top-right. Circular 96×96 avatar (swipecircle-photo-frame, coral ring) overlaps the bottom edge of the cover. Below the cover: name+age in display font, distance+activity tag, 1-3 sentence bio. Then a single full-width coral pill 'Edit Profile' button (with Edit icon). Below the hero block: stats-bar with 3 stats — 'X swiped · Y matches · Z.W★ rating' — coral numerics, muted labels. Then tech-pills displaying selected interests (read-only, soft border style). Then settings-nav: a clean list of Notifications / Privacy / Help / Logout, each row with a small leading icon and a chevron-right at the right. Tap navigates. Bottom-tab-bar with Profile active.
page_briefs.profile-other: Same shell pattern as profile-own but with mobile-profile-hero in other-profile preset. Cover photo, BackButton at top-left, MoreMenuButton at top-right, overlapping avatar. Name+age, distance+activity (e.g. 'Online now'). Bio. Then the action row: 'Message' coral pill (primary, ~50% width) with Send icon, 'Like Again' white-bordered pill with Heart icon, 'Report' ghost icon-only button (Flag icon, muted color). Stats-bar shows 'Joined March 2026', 'Active 2h ago', 'Mutual matches: 3'. Tech-pills shows interests with shared ones highlighted in coral fill, others in muted-border. Bottom-tab-bar inherits active state from referrer (Matches or Chat).
page_briefs.settings: Simple settings page on mobile-tab-bar shell. Header shows 'Settings' title with back button. Body: settings-nav (standard preset) at top — vertical list of section links: Notifications (Bell icon), Privacy (Lock icon), Account (User icon), Help (HelpCircle icon), About (Info icon). Each row is 56px tall with leading icon, label, optional subtitle, and chevron-right. Below the nav, a form with the most common toggles: 'Push notifications', 'Show me on Discover', 'Read receipts' — each a labeled switch (coral when on, muted when off). At the bottom of the body, with 32px breathing room above: 'Log Out' link in danger color, centered, ghost style. Tap shows a confirmation modal ('Are you sure?'); confirm clears demo state and routes to /. Bottom-tab-bar with Profile active.

directives: All pages share the mobile-tab-bar shell and persist the bottom-tab-bar across page transitions
Bottom-tab-bar 4 items: Swipe (/discover, Heart icon, hotkey g d), Matches (/matches, Users icon, hotkey g m), Chat (/chat, MessageCircle icon, hotkey g c), Profile (/me, User icon, hotkey g p)
Swipe gestures (← / →) only fire on the /discover route — input_guard prevents firing while typing in chat
Match celebration triggers on a successful right-swipe (mocked: 30% chance in demo mode) — first-match preset adds confetti, subsequent matches use subsequent-match preset
All photo content uses circular swipecircle-photo-frame for avatars, full-bleed with gradient overlay for cards
Demo mode (localStorage flag 'sc_demo' = true) populates 30 mock cards on first /discover load, 12 mock matches, and 3 pre-existing chat threads with sample histories

shells.mobile-tab-bar: Mobile-first shell with sticky compact header (52px), single-scroll body with bottom padding, and fixed bottom tab-bar (64px + safe-area inset). The bottom tab-bar hosts 4 nav items rendered by bottom-tab-bar pattern. Body owns the only scroll axis.

personality: Mobile-first social discovery primary archetype. Photo-centric swipe deck dominates the visual hierarchy with bouncy spring physics and tactile gestural feedback. Coral primaries pop against warm peach backgrounds; violet match accents punctuate moments of joy. Bottom-tab-bar persists for always-available navigation. Match moments feel celebratory with the coral-to-violet burst overlay; chats feel intimate with rounded swipecircle-bubble messages. Empty states encourage rather than scold. Designed to feel native on iPhone but elegantly scaled in the 480px-wide centered desktop column.

certification.rationale: Contains demo-mode localStorage session guidance; excluded from enterprise artifact sets.
